examples: Another adaptation to the salty environment is the ability to excrete excess salt back to the environment.
To excrete perspiration through the pores of the skin.
Infected poultry excrete virus in their secretions and faeces.
Although the volunteers will excrete the vaccine in their faeces, it will be destroyed by the sewage treatment system.
The planet now harbors a strain of the famous bacterium Escherichia coli (e. coli) that can chew up plants and excrete biodiesel.
